title: Freezeover
description: A modpack set on a frozen exoplanet where you have to survive the harsh temperatures!
body:
# Freezeover

![Freezeover Open Alpha logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84313529e07f766251318b6a8ee20d45c741c842.png)  
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/freezeover?style=for-the-badge)
![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/freezeover?style=for-the-badge)
![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/freezeover?style=for-the-badge)


## Welcome to Freezeover!

Freezeover is a modpack set on a frozen exoplanet named *TERRA-B14*, and you have to survive the harsh cold.  
The pack is currently not finished, so please report any issues [here](https://github.com/StikyPiston/Freezeover/issues), and have any discussions [here](https://github.com/StikyPiston/Freezeover/discussions)

## Lore of Freezeover

- You play as Researcher Delta, a researcher for *Galactic Solutions, Inc.*
- *Galactic Solutions* is a space agency specialising in finding exoplanets which are able to sustain human life.
- You, alongside Researcher Beta, have been sent to exoplanet *TERRA-B14*, 10.2 light-years away from Earth, to study the planet and determine how well it supports human life.
- Unfortunately, Researcher Beta did not make it, and now you are alone on this frozen planet.
- Your goal is to survive on *TERRA-B14*
## Lore of *Galactic Solutions*

- *Galactic Solutions, Inc.* was founded in 2014
- Its main goal was to find habitable exoplanets where humans could live in the future.
- *Galactic Solutions* employed many researchers and sent them to several exoplanets to study them and see whether or not they are able to realistically sustain human life.
- Researcher Delta (You) and Researcher Beta were sent to *TERRA-B14* on January 1, 2016, and arrived on March 14, 2026.
